use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF NAUSEA AND VOMITING, INCLUDING THE PREVENTION OF ACUTE AND DELAYED NAUSEA AND VOMITING ASSOCIATED WITH INITIAL AND REPEAT COURSES OF HIGHLY OR MODERATELY EMETOGENIC CANCER CHEMOTHERAPY

indications.text:
CINVANTI, in combination with other antiemetic agents, is indicated in adults for the prevention of:
• acute and delayed nausea and vomiting associated with initial and repeat courses of highly emetogenic cancer
chemotherapy (HEC) including high-dose cisplatin as a single-dose regimen.
• delayed nau...
